## Prototype Submission

> Submit your working prototype as a PR. Every field below is required.
> Read the [Submitters Guide](../docs/team-manifest/submitters-guide.md) before submitting.

---

### Problem Statement

<!-- What real problem does this solve? Who experiences it? 1-2 paragraphs. -->



### Dollar Value Framing

<!-- Is this saving money, generating revenue, or reducing risk? Provide a rough estimate.
     Example: "Saves 3 hours/week x 200 people x $50/hr = $1.56M/year" -->

- **Value type**: <!-- Cost savings / Revenue generation / Risk reduction -->
- **Estimated annual value**: <!-- $ amount with calculation -->

### Working Prototype

<!-- Link to the working prototype or describe how to run it. This is not a sketch or a slide deck.
     It must be a minimum working demo that someone can try. -->

- **Link/location**: <!-- URL, repo path, or deployment link -->
- **How to run it**: <!-- Steps to get the prototype running -->
- **Tech stack used**: <!-- Languages, frameworks, APIs -->

### Effort So Far

<!-- How much time and resources went into building this? Be honest. -->

- **Time invested**: <!-- e.g., "~40 hours over 3 weeks" -->
- **People involved**: <!-- e.g., "1 engineer + 1 designer (part-time)" -->
- **Tools/services used**: <!-- e.g., "Claude, GitHub Copilot, AWS Lambda free tier" -->

### What's Needed to Graduate

<!-- What would it take to make this production-ready? -->

- **Team size**: <!-- e.g., "2 engineers, 1 PM (part-time)" -->
- **Timeline**: <!-- e.g., "3 months" -->
- **Budget**: <!-- e.g., "$15K for cloud infra + API costs" -->
- **Key dependencies**: <!-- e.g., "Access to production customer data, security review" -->

### Risk Assessment

<!-- Be upfront about risks. This helps reviewers trust your submission. -->

- **Data sensitivity**: <!-- What data does this touch? Any PII or confidential data? -->
- **Security implications**: <!-- Authentication, access control, external API exposure? -->
- **Integration complexity**: <!-- What existing systems does this need to connect to? -->
- **Compliance considerations**: <!-- Any regulatory or policy concerns? -->

### Demo

<!-- Reviewers need to see it working. Provide at least one of the following. -->

- **Video link**: <!-- Loom, YouTube, or other video demo -->
- **Screenshots**: <!-- Attach screenshots or link to them -->
- **Live demo**: <!-- URL if deployed somewhere accessible -->

### Category

<!-- Check ONE primary category. -->

- [ ] AI/ML
- [ ] Automation
- [ ] Data
- [ ] UX
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Process
- [ ] Other

---

### Submission Checklist

- [ ] Prototype is functional (someone can run/use it today)
- [ ] Demo link works (video, screenshots, or live demo included)
- [ ] Risk assessment completed (all four areas addressed)
- [ ] I have read the [Submitters Guide](../docs/team-manifest/submitters-guide.md)
